description: Discovery-phase risks — threats identified BEFORE execution, distinct from project risks (L30)
purpose: Capture pre-execution threats and blind spots identified during discovery to inform mitigation planning

schema.risk_type: enum - threat | blind_spot | dependency | assumption_failure | environmental

sibling: L30/risks - project-level risks migrate here when discovered pre-execution

notes: L30 (risks) stays for project-level operational risks. L124 captures discovery-phase pre-execution risks. A risk can migrate from L124 → L30 when a mission proceeds to execution.
